criteria.reason: Sync requires and validates a fresh preview token before writing.
Sync recomputes the preview token from fresh CRM data and refuses changed datasets.
Appointment resource fields now produce workplace metrics and normalized workplace import rows.
Targeted backend tests, broader finance tests, py_compile, frontend eslint, and production build passed.
UI requires preview before confirmed import and explains the flow.
